summary: P1+P2 backend features fully verified (26/26 pytest cases pass). Frontend Settings, Follow toggle, Community Moderation, SEO on home/games/game-detail/tags, robots.txt all work. Two real frontend bugs found: (1) GameDetail tags still render as <span> with no data-testid=game-tag-<t> and no <Link> routing to /tags/<t>; (2) CreatorProfile imports SEO but never renders it (creator page title is still 'Emergent | Fullstack App' instead of 'GoodGame.center'). GamePicker exists in Clips upload form (behind clips-upload-toggle).

minor.issue: Cloudflare in front of preview env returns 403 for clients with default urllib User-Agent (no UA header). Not a backend bug — applies to any non-browser client missing a UA. Tests should set a UA header or use playwright's request context.

ui_bugs.issue: Tags rendered as <span> instead of <Link to=`/tags/<t>`> and missing data-testid=`game-tag-<t>`. Spec says game-detail tags must be Link elements that route to /tags/<t> with that testid.
SEO component imported but NEVER rendered. /creators/<username> page title is 'Emergent | Fullstack App' (default index.html) instead of 'GoodGame.center'. og:title meta also missing.
ui_bugs.selector: /app/frontend/src/pages/CreatorProfile.jsx (import on line 6, never used in JSX)

action_items: Fix GameDetail.jsx tag rendering: wrap each tag in <Link to={`/tags/${t}`} data-testid={`game-tag-${t}`}>.
Render <SEO title={`${displayName} · GoodGame.center`} path={`/creators/${username}`} description={user.bio || ...} /> in CreatorProfile.jsx so creator pages have proper title + og tags.
(Optional) Tests creating users via raw urllib must set a User-Agent header; preview ingress (Cloudflare) blocks default urllib UA with 403.
critical_code_review_comments: profile.py /me/avatar correctly uses a random asset_id (not user.id) in the public URL — good privacy hygiene.
Image content-type and size limits applied BEFORE reading entire body would be even safer, but current implementation reads then checks length — acceptable given UploadFile small buffer.
follow endpoint is idempotent (returns following=true even on repeat) — correct.
discover.py _filter_real_owner_games is duplicated from games.py logic (is_real_owner) — consider extracting helper to db utility module to follow DRY (>10-line repetition).
communities.py change_role is owner-only and rejects role on owner — correct invariant. mute/ban also guard owner.
reports resolve correctly enforces mod-role for community-scoped reports, reporter-only for non-community — looks solid.
CreatorProfile.jsx imports SEO but never uses it — unused import lint warning would have caught this.
GamePicker uses 200ms debounce + correct cleanup — good. onBlur 120ms timeout to allow mousedown is a common but slightly fragile pattern; mousedown approach is correct.
Per-route rate limits are in-memory (auth.rate_limit) — same caveat as iteration 1: lost on backend restart, not multi-worker safe.

success_rate.backend: 100% (26/26 P1+P2 cases pass; iteration_1 suite still 34/35)
success_rate.frontend: ~80% (settings, follow toggle, community moderation, SEO on home/games/game-detail/tag/clips, robots.txt all verified; 2 page-level bugs found above)

test_credentials: None seeded. Tests onboard fresh users on the fly. Pre-existing data: goodgame_tester / neon-starfighter (tags: retro, arcade, space).
seed_data_creation: Each run creates ~5 ephemeral users (pa*, pb*, pc*, ux*) + 2 communities (Mod*, RepC*, UM*). All persist in MongoDB; harmless.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Two P2 frontend regressions: (a) GameDetail.jsx tag spans must become Link with data-testid=game-tag-<t>; (b) CreatorProfile.jsx must render <SEO> (currently only imported). After main agent fixes these, re-verify by visiting /games/neon-starfighter (expect 3 elements with data-testid^=game-tag-) and /creators/goodgame_tester (expect <title> containing 'GoodGame.center' and an og:title meta tag). Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_goodgame_p2.py and pass cleanly when REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL is exported (it's also resolved via .env in supervisor). To bypass Cloudflare's UA filter when running pytest from this env, the requests library used by tests is fine — only stdlib urllib gets 403.
rca of the issue: Both frontend bugs are simple omissions in JSX: (1) GameDetail.jsx never updated the tag <span> elements to <Link> when the /tags/:tag route was added; (2) CreatorProfile.jsx had SEO imported (line 6) but the developer forgot to add the <SEO/> JSX inside the return — easy to miss without an unused-import lint rule. Both are mechanical fixes.
